name: Tomas Birkov
armor_desc: 12 in wolf or hybrid form, natural armor
damage_immunities: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks not made with silvered weapons
trueNature: Werewolf — cursed woodsman. Appears as a tall, gaunt man with deep-set eyes, a thick beard, and fresh scratches on his hands. He arrived at the inn an hour ago claiming to be a trapper. He is restless and agitated — the full moon rises tonight.

humanDisguise.name: Tomas Birkov
humanDisguise.appearance: Tall, lean, weathered face, thick dark beard. Wears a heavy fur-lined coat and muddy boots. Fresh claw marks on his forearms he claims are from a bear. Eyes flicker amber in firelight.
humanDisguise.personality: Terse, avoids eye contact, drinks water not ale. Flinches at loud noises. Sits near the door. Keeps glancing at the shuttered windows as if checking the sky.
knowledge: Knows these woods intimately — every trail, every cave
Has been cursed for two years, bitten by another werewolf
Cannot control the transformation when the full moon rises
Came to the inn hoping to lock himself in the cellar before moonrise
Can smell the vampire — knows something unnatural is here but doesn't know what

revealTriggers: The full moon becomes visible through a broken shutter or opened door
He is badly wounded and the beast takes over in self-preservation
Someone discovers the claw marks aren't from a bear (DC 14 Medicine/Nature)
Brother Aldric's Sense Evil triggers near him
Midnight approaches and he becomes desperate to reach the cellar

special_abilities.name: Shapechanger
special_abilities.desc: Can use its action to polymorph into a wolf-humanoid hybrid or into a wolf, or back into its true form (human). Its statistics, other than AC, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. Reverts to true form if it dies.

special_abilities.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
special_abilities.desc: The werewolf has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

special_abilities.name: Involuntary Transformation
special_abilities.desc: When the full moon is visible, Tomas must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or transform involuntarily. He loses control and attacks the nearest creature.

actions.name: Shortsword (Humanoid Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Hunting Knife (Humanoid Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack (Hybrid Form Only)
actions.desc: Makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.

actions.name: Bite (Wolf or Hybrid Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with werewolf lycanthropy.

actions.name: Claws (Hybrid Form Only)
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage.

description: In human form: Tomas Birkov, a gaunt trapper who arrived just before the PCs. Quiet, nervous, avoids questions. In hybrid form: a massive wolf-man with amber eyes and slavering jaws. The transformation is violent and terrifying — bones crack, fur erupts, his screams become howls.
